summary: Frontend-only verification of Bhramanti Paradise Tours landing page. Tested all required data-testids, link correctness (wa.me/919876543210, tel:+919876543210), smooth scroll, mobile menu at 375px viewport, and console errors. All sections (header, hero, destinations x8, services x6, testimonials, CTA, footer, floating WhatsApp) render correctly. One minor testid bug found and fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: Services.jsx testid generator originally only replaced whitespace, so 'Group & Family Tours' produced 'group-&-family-tours' (with ampersand) — broke expected testids 'group-family-tours' and 'flights-transfers'. FIXED by normalizing non-alphanumerics to hyphens.

Hero.jsx heading renders 'Wander beyond
the ordinary.' (with trailing period as design choice). textContent concatenates across
so substring match against 'Wander beyond the ordinary' fails — visual rendering is correct; this is acceptable but flagged if exact match is required.

success_rate.frontend: 100% after fix (34/34 desktop checks + mobile menu checks pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Static landing page, no backend. All CTAs are wa.me/919876543210 and tel:+919876543210 deep links. Service card testid generator now strips '&' and normalizes punctuation to hyphens. Verified at 1920x1080 and 375x812 viewports. No console errors.
verified_flows: Header: brand-logo, nav-link-{destinations,services,stories,contact}, header-whatsapp-cta with correct wa.me href
Hero: hero-heading 'Wander beyond / the ordinary.', hero-whatsapp-cta (wa.me/919876543210), hero-call-cta (tel:+919876543210)
Destinations: all 8 cards (bali, switzerland, maldives, dubai, paris, kerala, kashmir, rajasthan) present with wa.me links
Services: all 6 cards (custom-itineraries, group-family-tours, luxury-escapes, visa-assistance, flights-transfers, curated-stays) present after fix
Floating WhatsApp (floating-whatsapp) fixed-positioned with wa.me link
Smooth scroll on nav-link-destinations click works
Mobile (375px): mobile-menu-toggle visible, mobile-menu opens, all mobile-nav-link-* + mobile-whatsapp-cta render
